seoTitle: How to Add Audio to a Canva Website
metaDescription: Learn how to upload, select, and adjust audio tracks for your Canva website to boost engagement with background music or voiceovers.
intro: Adding audio to a Canva website can make it feel more immersive, whether you're building a portfolio, landing page, or educational resource. This tutorial covers uploading audio files, choosing music, and adjusting playback so it fits your site.

steps.heading: Upload audio files
steps.body: Add your own audio tracks or voiceovers into your Canva website project.

steps.heading: Select background music
steps.body: Choose music that complements the tone and purpose of your website.

steps.heading: Adjust audio settings
steps.body: Fine-tune playback settings to ensure smooth, appropriate audio delivery on your site.

steps.heading: Add voiceovers for storytelling
steps.body: Incorporate voiceovers to strengthen storytelling or explain content directly to visitors.

steps.heading: Review final tips and tricks
steps.body: Apply best practices for integrating audio smoothly into your overall website design.

faq.question: Can I use my own audio files on a Canva website?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers how to upload and manage your own audio files within Canva.

faq.question: Is this useful for business landing pages?
faq.answer: Yes, audio can enhance business landing pages, portfolios, and educational resources by making them more engaging.

faq.question: Do I need audio editing experience?
faq.answer: No, the process is designed to be accessible for both beginners and seasoned professionals.

faq.question: Can audio help with storytelling on a website?
faq.answer: Yes, background music and voiceovers can enhance storytelling and make website content more memorable.
